ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'USA(OEM)') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Europe Sales Department') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'American Sales Department') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Middle East and Africa Sales Department') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Asia-Pacific Sales Department') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Key Account Sales Department') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Communications Sales Department')) && ISPICKVAL( Classification__c ,'Customer of Oversea Company')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Customer sales region is not Oversea Company!
